title: nidorella nordenstamii
intro: Nidorella nordenstamii, a species of flowering plant in the daisy family, is native to tropical Africa and is also known as the 'African Daisy'. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its leaves, which have been traditionally used to treat various ailments. The health benefits of Nidorella nordenstamii include its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and reduce the risk of infection. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water or by using them in a decoction to create a tea that can be used to treat a range of health issues.
